languages.original_text: "For myself, however, a key aspect of the Machine God is His omniscience. I gather wisdom, and that includes from communicating with laypersons — to this end, standard Low Gothic has so far proved to be the most useful. However, this does not negate the fact that I am able to speak all the binharic dialects of Mars, if circumstances so demand."

languages.text: "Для меня же ключевым аспектом Бога-Машины является его всесведущесть. Я собираю мудрость, в том числе из общения с мирянами — для этого конвенциональный низкий готик пока что оказывается наиболее пригодным. Впрочем, это не исключает того, что я способен говорить на всех бинарных диалектах Марса, если того требуют обстоятельства".

"For myself, however, a key aspect of the Machine God is His omniscience. I gather wisdom, and that includes from communicating with laypersons — to this end, standard Low Gothic has so far proved to be the most useful. However, this does not negate the fact that I am able to speak all the binharic dialects of Mars, if circumstances so demand."

Я собираю мудрость, в том числе из общения с мирянами — для этого конвенциональный низкий готик пока что оказывается наиболее пригодным. Впрочем, это не исключает того, что я способен говорить на всех бинарных диалектах Марса, если того требуют обстоятельства".

I gather wisdom, and that includes from communicating with laypersons — to this end, standard Low Gothic has so far proved to be the most useful. However, this does not negate the fact that I am able to speak all the binharic dialects of Mars, if circumstances so demand."

"For myself, however, a key aspect of the Machine God is His omniscience. I gather wisdom, and that includes from communicating with laypersons — to this end, standard Low Gothic has so far proved to be the most useful. However, this does not negate the fact that I am able to speak all the binharic dialects of Mars, if circumstances so demand."

"For myself, however, a key aspect of the Machine God is His omniscience. I gather wisdom, and that includes from communicating with laypersons — to this end, standard Low Gothic has so far proved to be the most useful. However, this does not negate the fact that I am able to speak all the binharic dialects of Mars, if circumstances so demand."

languages.text: «Para mí, un aspecto clave del Dios Máquina es su omnisciencia. Recopilo sabiduría, incluyendo la que obtengo al comunicarme con los laicos, y para ello el Bajo Gótico ha demostrado ser más útil. Sin embargo, eso no me impide hablar todos los dialectos de binario de Marte en caso de que las circunstancias lo exijan».
languages.original_text: "For myself, however, a key aspect of the Machine God is His omniscience. I gather wisdom, and that includes from communicating with laypersons — to this end, standard Low Gothic has so far proved to be the most useful. However, this does not negate the fact that I am able to speak all the binharic dialects of Mars, if circumstances so demand."

traits.locale_text: «Para mí, un aspecto clave del Dios Máquina es su omnisciencia. Recopilo sabiduría, incluyendo la que obtengo al comunicarme con los laicos, y para ello el Bajo Gótico ha demostrado ser más útil. Sin embargo, eso no me impide hablar todos los dialectos de binario de Marte en caso de que las circunstancias lo exijan».

languages.text: “不过就我而言，万机之神的一个关键特质就是全知。我广纳智慧，而与教外人士交流就是途径之一。为此，标准低哥特语依然是最有效的工具。不过若情势所需，我能流利使用火星上所有二进制方言，这点毋庸置疑。”
languages.original_text: "For myself, however, a key aspect of the Machine God is His omniscience. I gather wisdom, and that includes from communicating with laypersons — to this end, standard Low Gothic has so far proved to be the most useful. However, this does not negate the fact that I am able to speak all the binharic dialects of Mars, if circumstances so demand."

traits.locale_text: “不过就我而言，万机之神的一个关键特质就是全知。我广纳智慧，而与教外人士交流就是途径之一。为此，标准低哥特语依然是最有效的工具。不过若情势所需，我能流利使用火星上所有二进制方言，这点毋庸置疑。”

languages.text: "Für mich persönlich ist ein Schlüsselaspekt des Maschinengottes allerdings seine Allwissenheit. Ich sammle Weisheit und das erfordert die Kommunikation mit Laien ... dabei hat sich Niedergotisch als Sprache der Wahl bewährt. Allerdings widerspricht dies nicht den Umstand, dass ich in allen binhärischen Dialekten des Mars sprechen kann, wenn es die Umstände erfordern."
languages.original_text: "For myself, however, a key aspect of the Machine God is His omniscience. I gather wisdom, and that includes from communicating with laypersons — to this end, standard Low Gothic has so far proved to be the most useful. However, this does not negate the fact that I am able to speak all the binharic dialects of Mars, if circumstances so demand."

traits.locale_text: "Für mich persönlich ist ein Schlüsselaspekt des Maschinengottes allerdings seine Allwissenheit. Ich sammle Weisheit und das erfordert die Kommunikation mit Laien ... dabei hat sich Niedergotisch als Sprache der Wahl bewährt. Allerdings widerspricht dies nicht den Umstand, dass ich in allen binhärischen Dialekten des Mars sprechen kann, wenn es die Umstände erfordern."

languages.text: « Pour ma part, j'estime que l'un des aspects essentiels du Dieu-Machine est Son omniscience. J'accumule du savoir de toutes les sources, et notamment en conversant avec des profanes, ce qui rend pour moi l'usage du bas gothique plus qu'utile. Cependant, je demeure parfaitement capable de parler tous les dialectes binhaires de Mars lorsque c'est nécessaire. »
languages.original_text: "For myself, however, a key aspect of the Machine God is His omniscience. I gather wisdom, and that includes from communicating with laypersons — to this end, standard Low Gothic has so far proved to be the most useful. However, this does not negate the fact that I am able to speak all the binharic dialects of Mars, if circumstances so demand."

traits.locale_text: « Pour ma part, j'estime que l'un des aspects essentiels du Dieu-Machine est Son omniscience. J'accumule du savoir de toutes les sources, et notamment en conversant avec des profanes, ce qui rend pour moi l'usage du bas gothique plus qu'utile. Cependant, je demeure parfaitement capable de parler tous les dialectes binhaires de Mars lorsque c'est nécessaire. »

languages.text: "Ancak benim için Makine Tanrı'nın temel bir yönü de O'nun herilimidir. Ben bilgelik peşindeyim ve bu, avamla iletişim kurmayı da içeriyor. Bu maksatla standart Adi Gotik, şimdiye kadar en yararlısı oldu. Ancak bu, koşullar gerektirdiğinde Mars'ın tüm ikilidil lehçelerini konuşabildiğim gerçeğini değiştirmez."
languages.original_text: "For myself, however, a key aspect of the Machine God is His omniscience. I gather wisdom, and that includes from communicating with laypersons — to this end, standard Low Gothic has so far proved to be the most useful. However, this does not negate the fact that I am able to speak all the binharic dialects of Mars, if circumstances so demand."

traits.locale_text: "Ancak benim için Makine Tanrı'nın temel bir yönü de O'nun herilimidir. Ben bilgelik peşindeyim ve bu, avamla iletişim kurmayı da içeriyor. Bu maksatla standart Adi Gotik, şimdiye kadar en yararlısı oldu. Ancak bu, koşullar gerektirdiğinde Mars'ın tüm ikilidil lehçelerini konuşabildiğim gerçeğini değiştirmez."

languages.text: 「しかし私にとって、機械神の核心をなす一面は、その全知性にあります。私は叡智を集めます――それには世俗の者との対話から得るものも含まれ、その目的には、これまでのところ標準的な低地ゴシック語が最も有用だと判明しています。とはいえ、状況が求めるならば、私が火星のあらゆるバイナリック方言を操れるという事実が、それで否定されるわけではありません」
languages.original_text: "For myself, however, a key aspect of the Machine God is His omniscience. I gather wisdom, and that includes from communicating with laypersons — to this end, standard Low Gothic has so far proved to be the most useful. However, this does not negate the fact that I am able to speak all the binharic dialects of Mars, if circumstances so demand."

traits.locale_text: 「しかし私にとって、機械神の核心をなす一面は、その全知性にあります。私は叡智を集めます――それには世俗の者との対話から得るものも含まれ、その目的には、これまでのところ標準的な低地ゴシック語が最も有用だと判明しています。とはいえ、状況が求めるならば、私が火星のあらゆるバイナリック方言を操れるという事実が、それで否定されるわけではありません」
